senses.definition: different from anything known before; new, interesting and often seeming slightly strange
senses.definition_cn: 新颖的；与众不同的；珍奇的

examples.en: Job-sharing is still a novel concept and it will take a while for employers to get used to it.
examples.cn: 工作分享仍然是一个新颖的概念，雇主需要一段时间才能习惯。
这个计划听上去挺有新意。

examples.en: It was an American who came up with the novel idea of drive-in restaurants.
examples.cn: 是一个美国人想出了“免下车”餐馆这个新奇的点子。
